results.title: Usha Mohandas, MD FACP - Associate Medical Director ...
results.snippet: Does supporting physicians to delivering better, more coordinated care actually save #Medicare money? A new study in JAMA Health Forum by Dr. Dhruv Khullar looked at the Medicare Shared Savings Program from 2012–2023. Here’s what it found: Medicare paid $15.8 billion in bonus payments to groups of physicians and hospitals that improved care and reduced unnecessary spending.
